name: Baked Stuffed Herring (Irish)
recipeInstructions:
1. First make the stuffing by mixing the breadcrumbs, parsley, beaten egg, lemon juice and peel, and salt and pepper.
2. Stuff the fish with the mixture.
3. Lay in an ovenproof dish, close together; add the cider, crumbled bayleaf and salt and pepper.
4. Cover with foil and bake at 350°F for about 35 minutes. Serves 4.
